{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Oriki Group is a leading wellness, beauty, and lifestyle brand committed to delivering premium spa, skincare, wellness, and hospitality experiences across Africa. With a focus on innovation, excellence, and holistic well-being, OR&Iacute;K&Igrave; continues to redefine luxury wellness through its diverse subsidiaries and customer-centered services

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Marketing Officer will support the execution of marketing strategies and campaigns aimed at increasing brand visibility, driving customer engagement, and promoting OR&Iacute;K&Igrave;&rsquo;s and other subsidiaries&rsquo; products and services.
	The role involves coordinating marketing activities, content creation, social media management, event support, and market research to enhance the company&rsquo;s growth and brand reputation.


Responsibilities
Marketing Campaign Execution:


	Assist in planning, coordinating, and implementing marketing and promotional campaigns across all channels.
	Support the creation of marketing materials (brochures, flyers, videos, etc.) for OR&Iacute;K&Igrave;&rsquo;s and other subsidiaries brand and product lines.
	Monitor and report on the effectiveness of marketing activities and campaigns.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure alignment of marketing activities with brand strategy and company objectives.


Digital Marketing &amp; Social Media:


	Manage day-to-day activities on OR&Iacute;K&Igrave;&rsquo;s and subsidiaries social media platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, etc.).
	Create engaging content (text, image, and video) to increase online engagement and followers.
	Track and analyze digital performance metrics such as reach, impressions, and engagement.
	Support SEO and online advertising efforts (Google Ads, Meta Ads) to improve visibility and traffic.


Branding &amp; Communication:


	Ensure consistency and accuracy of brand messaging across all platforms.
	Assist in preparing press releases, newsletters, and other corporate communications.
	Support brand awareness initiatives and customer engagement activities.
	Help maintain and update the company website and online directories.


Market Research &amp; Consumer Insights:


	Conduct research to understand customer needs, preferences, and market trends.
	Gather competitor information and provide insights for product positioning.
	Analyze customer feedback and campaign data to suggest improvements.


Events &amp; Partnerships support:


	Assist in the planning and execution of company events, activations, and exhibitions.
	Support partnership initiatives by providing required marketing materials and logistics coordination.
	Represent OR&Iacute;K&Igrave; and subsidiaries at events, ensuring professional brand presentation.


Requirements


	Must possess a minimum of 1 year of work experience in Marketing, User Acquisition Marketing or Sales.
	Familiarity with acquisition analysis, A/B testing, and ad fraud detection.
	Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail.
	Proven track record of successful growth campaigns.
	Expertise with SEO, paid search, paid social, display, retargeting and analytical tools for marketers, such as Google Analytics, Google Trends.
	Up-to-date knowledge of mobile performance marketing, trends, and best practices.
	Knowledge of marketing-related business practices, including advertising, market research, technology and budgeting.


Functional / Technical:


	Leverage analytic tools (Google Analytics, Think with Google, and Google Trends) during market research to find ways to enhance the company&rsquo;s marketing efforts Responsible for carrying our missions for ORIKI by increasing.
	Proficiency in various digital marketing channels such as social media, search engine optimization (SEO), pay-per-click (PPC) advertising, email marketing, content marketing, and affiliate marketing.
	Understanding of the strengths and limitations of each channel and the ability to develop integrated marketing strategies that leverage multiple channels for maximum impact.
	Able to manage SEO/SEM, marketing database, email, social media and/or display advertising campaigns.
	Analyze the performance of different marketing channels (e.g., social media, email, paid advertising) in terms of reach, engagement, and conversion.
	Develop and oversee the implementation of growth marketing campaigns, with a focus on content marketing, social media marketing, and paid advertising.


Salary
N300,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: jointheteam@orikigroup.com using &quot;Marketing Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Marketing Officer Job at Oriki Group




        
    

        
        Oriki Group is a leading wellness, beauty, and lifestyle brand committed to delivering premium spa, skincare, wellness, and hospitality experiences across Africa. With a focus on innovation, excellence, and holistic well-being, ORÍKÌ continues to redefine luxury wellness through its diverse subsidiaries and customer-centered services

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Marketing Officer will support the execution of marketing strategies and campaigns aimed at increasing brand visibility, driving customer engagement, and promoting ORÍKÌ’s and other subsidiaries’ products and services.
	The role involves coordinating marketing activities, content creation, social media management, event support, and market research to enhance the company’s growth and brand reputation.


Responsibilities
Marketing Campaign Execution:


	Assist in planning, coordinating, and implementing marketing and promotional campaigns across all channels.
	Support the creation of marketing materials (brochures, flyers, videos, etc.) for ORÍKÌ’s and other subsidiaries brand and product lines.
	Monitor and report on the effectiveness of marketing activities and campaigns.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure alignment of marketing activities with brand strategy and company objectives.


Digital Marketing & Social Media:


	Manage day-to-day activities on ORÍKÌ’s and subsidiaries social media platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, TikTok, etc.).
	Create engaging content (text, image, and video) to increase online engagement and followers.
	Track and analyze digital performance metrics such as reach, impressions, and engagement.
	Support SEO and online advertising efforts (Google Ads, Meta Ads) to improve visibility and traffic.


Branding & Communication:


	Ensure consistency and accuracy of brand messaging across all platforms.
	Assist in preparing press releases, newsletters, and other corporate communications.
	Support brand awareness initiatives and customer engagement activities.
	Help maintain and update the company website and online directories.


Market Research & Consumer Insights:


	Conduct research to understand customer needs, preferences, and market trends.
	Gather competitor information and provide insights for product positioning.
	Analyze customer feedback and campaign data to suggest improvements.


Events & Partnerships support:


	Assist in the planning and execution of company events, activations, and exhibitions.
	Support partnership initiatives by providing required marketing materials and logistics coordination.
	Represent ORÍKÌ and subsidiaries at events, ensuring professional brand presentation.


Requirements


	Must possess a minimum of 1 year of work experience in Marketing, User Acquisition Marketing or Sales.
	Familiarity with acquisition analysis, A/B testing, and ad fraud detection.
	Analytical mindset with strong attention to detail.
	Proven track record of successful growth campaigns.
	Expertise with SEO, paid search, paid social, display, retargeting and analytical tools for marketers, such as Google Analytics, Google Trends.
	Up-to-date knowledge of mobile performance marketing, trends, and best practices.
	Knowledge of marketing-related business practices, including advertising, market research, technology and budgeting.


Functional / Technical:


	Leverage analytic tools (Google Analytics, Think with Google, and Google Trends) during market research to find ways to enhance the company’s marketing efforts Responsible for carrying our missions for ORIKI by increasing.
	Proficiency in various digital marketing channels such as social media, search engine optimization (SEO), pay-per-click (PPC) advertising, email marketing, content marketing, and affiliate marketing.
	Understanding of the strengths and limitations of each channel and the ability to develop integrated marketing strategies that leverage multiple channels for maximum impact.
	Able to manage SEO/SEM, marketing database, email, social media and/or display advertising campaigns.
	Analyze the performance of different marketing channels (e.g., social media, email, paid advertising) in terms of reach, engagement, and conversion.
	Develop and oversee the implementation of growth marketing campaigns, with a focus on content marketing, social media marketing, and paid advertising.


Salary
N300,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Marketing Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

From humble beginnings it has grown into a group of 3 hospitals located in Karu, Garki and Maitama districts of the FCT . The group possesses advanced medical equipments to assist its team of highly qualified and dedicated health personnels. These equipments include but are not limited to the 64-slice CT scan unit, 4D-Ultrasonography, Mammography unit with stereotatic biopsy and Intra-operative C-arm fluoroscopy allowing for excellent diagnosis and cure. The hospital renders services in all major fields of medicine such as: Surgery, Paediatrics, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Internal Medicine, Radiology and Dentistry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location: Maitama, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties and Responsibilities


	Recruiting and interviewing potential applicants on experience, skills, and education
	Organizing and managing new employee orientation, onboarding and training programs.
	Updating job requirements when needed and contacting applicants&rsquo; references.
	Performing criminal background checks required by the company
	Explaining and providing information on employee benefits, programs, and education
	Drawing up plans for future personnel hiring procedures and goals Performing administrative tasks
	Overseeing employee health and safety procedures
	Advising on company benefit needs or evaluating benefit contract bids
	Maintaining employee records and paperwork; answering employee questions and addressing employee concerns with the company.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND / B.Sc Degree, CIPM Certification with 7 - 9 years of relevant work experience.
	With a Minimum of 3 Years of Post-CIPM Qualification Experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@abujaclinics.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

HR Manager Job at Abuja Clinics




        
    

        
        Abuja Clinics was established in 1989 as a health institution to provide efficient medical services to the then budding Federal Capital Territory (FCT). From humble beginnings it has grown into a group of 3 hospitals located in Karu, Garki and Maitama districts of the FCT . The group possesses advanced medical equipments to assist its team of highly qualified and dedicated health personnels. These equipments include but are not limited to the 64-slice CT scan unit, 4D-Ultrasonography, Mammography unit with stereotatic biopsy and Intra-operative C-arm fluoroscopy allowing for excellent diagnosis and cure. The hospital renders services in all major fields of medicine such as: Surgery, Paediatrics, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Internal Medicine, Radiology and Dentistry.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager

Job Location: Maitama, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties and Responsibilities


	Recruiting and interviewing potential applicants on experience, skills, and education
	Organizing and managing new employee orientation, onboarding and training programs.
	Updating job requirements when needed and contacting applicants’ references.
	Performing criminal background checks required by the company
	Explaining and providing information on employee benefits, programs, and education
	Drawing up plans for future personnel hiring procedures and goals Performing administrative tasks
	Overseeing employee health and safety procedures
	Advising on company benefit needs or evaluating benefit contract bids
	Maintaining employee records and paperwork; answering employee questions and addressing employee concerns with the company.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND / B.Sc Degree, CIPM Certification with 7 - 9 years of relevant work experience.
	With a Minimum of 3 Years of Post-CIPM Qualification Experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Executive",
  "description": "Bravies Homz Limited is a real estate development and sales company committed to delivering credible, well structured, and value driven real estate solutions. Our Reputation is our most valuable Asset.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Area 11 - Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate must have a proven track record in business development and real estate sales and be passionate about achieving ambitious targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities through prospecting, networking, referrals, and strategic partnerships.
	Generate, qualify, and convert leads into successful property sales.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, investors, and corporate organizations.
	Conduct property presentations, site inspections, and client meetings
	Prepare and deliver compelling sales proposals and presentations.
	Negotiate and close sales while ensuring excellent customer service.
	Maintain an active sales pipeline and provide regular sales reports.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and emerging business opportunities.
	Represent the company at exhibitions, networking events, and promotional activities.
	Consistently achieve and exceed assigned sales targets.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Estate Management, or a related field.
	3&ndash;5 years of proven experience in Business Development or Sales.
	Previous experience in the real estate industry is mandatory.
	Demonstrated ability to meet or exceed sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of the Abuja real estate market and property sales process is an added advantage.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong networking and relationship management abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM tools.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and target-driven.


What We Offer


	Competitive Salary: N100,000 - N250,000 / month.&nbsp;
	Attractive commission and performance-based incentives.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
	A supportive and performance-driven work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hrbravies@gmail.com using &quot;Application &ndash; Business Development Executive&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Business Development Executive Job at Bravies Homz Limited




        
    

        
        Bravies Homz Limited is a real estate development and sales company committed to delivering credible, well structured, and value driven real estate solutions. Our Reputation is our most valuable Asset.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Executive

Job Location: Area 11 - Garki, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The ideal candidate must have a proven track record in business development and real estate sales and be passionate about achieving ambitious targets.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Identify and develop new business opportunities through prospecting, networking, referrals, and strategic partnerships.
	Generate, qualify, and convert leads into successful property sales.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, investors, and corporate organizations.
	Conduct property presentations, site inspections, and client meetings
	Prepare and deliver compelling sales proposals and presentations.
	Negotiate and close sales while ensuring excellent customer service.
	Maintain an active sales pipeline and provide regular sales reports.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and emerging business opportunities.
	Represent the company at exhibitions, networking events, and promotional activities.
	Consistently achieve and exceed assigned sales targets.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Estate Management, or a related field.
	3–5 years of proven experience in Business Development or Sales.
	Previous experience in the real estate industry is mandatory.
	Demonstrated ability to meet or exceed sales targets.
	Strong knowledge of the Abuja real estate market and property sales process is an added advantage.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
	Strong networking and relationship management abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM tools.
	Self-motivated, proactive, and target-driven.


What We Offer


	Competitive Salary: N100,000 - N250,000 / month. 
	Attractive commission and performance-based incentives.
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
	A supportive and performance-driven work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Application – Business Development Executive" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager (Engineer Only)",
  "description": "Castel Resources Consultancy Limited - We unlock your business&#39;s full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager (Engineer Only)
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Plan, coordinate, and supervise engineering projects.
	Manage project schedules, budgets, and resources.
	Monitor project progress and ensure timely delivery.
	Coordinate contractors, consultants, and project teams.
	Prepare project reports and documentation.
	Ensure compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Engineering (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, or related discipline).
	Minimum of 5 years of project management experience.
	COREN registration is an added advantage.
	Strong leadership and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Project and other project management tools.


Method of Applictaion&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: castelhrjobs@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Project Manager (Engineer Only) Job at Castel Resources Consultancy Limited




        
    

        
        Castel Resources Consultancy Limited - We unlock your business's full potential with our comprehensive HR outsourcing services. Our expert team handles everything from recruitment and payroll processing to employee benefits administration and compliance, freeing you from administrative burdens and ensuring legal compliance. With advanced HR technology, strategic planning, and dedicated support for employee development and relations, we streamline your HR functions, allowing you to focus on your core business activities and drive growth. Partner with us to elevate your HR capabilities and achieve seamless, efficient operations.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager (Engineer Only)
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Plan, coordinate, and supervise engineering projects.
	Manage project schedules, budgets, and resources.
	Monitor project progress and ensure timely delivery.
	Coordinate contractors, consultants, and project teams.
	Prepare project reports and documentation.
	Ensure compliance with quality, safety, and regulatory standards.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, or related discipline).
	Minimum of 5 years of project management experience.
	COREN registration is an added advantage.
	Strong leadership and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Project and other project management tools.


Method of Applictaion 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Personal Assistant to the MD (Female) Job at Montaigne Place




        
    

        
        Montaigne Place is a leading luxury retail company that offers an exquisite range of cosmetics, fragrances, skincare, lifestyle products, and spa and wellness services. Established in 1995, Montaigne Place is a trading name of Montaigne AH Ltd. began its journey in the Nigerian beauty sector as exclusive agents and distributors of the prestigious Clarins brand.

Today, Montaigne Place operations extend across retail, wholesale, and spa & wellness, with its flagship retail division, Montaigne Place, boasting a network of Forty (40) outlets throughout Nigeria. These outlets are strategically located in Lagos, the country's commercial hub, as well as in Abuja, the capital city, and Port Harcourt, along with other prominent cities.
     

            
    



We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Personal Assistant to the MD (Female)
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in a related field
	Minimum of three years experience working with senior executives
	Must be smart and proactive
	Efficient use of time management and calendar tools
	Eloquent, smart and must possess poise
	Proficient with microsoft suite
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and  work independently
	Ability to prepare and edit correspondence, reports and presentation
	Ability to manage calendars, appointments and travel documents
	Liaising with stake holder, clients and team members etc.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates are to send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply
